---
description: Aggregate agent-invocation cost from .claude/telemetry/, broken down by agent, skill, and time window

---
> Cursor-side mirror of `/cost-report`. Source of truth: `.claude/skills/cost-report/SKILL.md`.


# /cost-report

Summarize what has been spent on AI agents. Lets the maintainer see where money is going without opening a billing dashboard.

## When to run

- End of week / month for budget awareness
- After a session that felt unusually long
- Before a phase-complete to check whether any agent is outside its cost envelope
- When `/status` flags a high cost in the "this month" field

## Procedure

1. **Locate telemetry.** Files under `.claude/telemetry/` follow one-entry-per-line JSONL format:

   ```jsonl
   {
     "ts": "2026-04-21T14:32:10Z",
     "agent": "code-reviewer",
     "model": "opus",
     "input_tokens": 12400,
     "output_tokens": 890,
     "cost_usd": 0.0953,
     "skill": "/review",
     "session": "<uuid>"
   }
   ```

2. **Filter by window.** Compute a cutoff ISO timestamp from `window`:
   - `day` — since midnight UTC today
   - `week` — since 00:00 UTC, 7 days ago
   - `month` — since first of this calendar month, UTC
   - `all` — no cutoff

3. **Aggregate** by: total, by-agent, by-skill, by-model, by-day.

4. **Flag outliers** — any agent whose average cost/invocation exceeds its expected envelope per rule 05 + ADR #0001. Rough envelopes:

   | Model tier                | Expected per-invocation cost |
   | ------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
   | Haiku (exploration)       | < $0.005                     |
   | Sonnet (implementation)   | $0.02 – $0.10                |
   | Opus (reasoning / review) | $0.05 – $0.30                |

5. **Check** against declared monthly caps if any are configured in `.claude/config/cost-caps.json` (file added when budgets become load-bearing; absence = no cap check).

## Output shape

```markdown
# Cost Report — <window label>

Window: <ISO start> → now
Telemetry entries: <N>

## Totals

| Metric             | Value  |
| ------------------ | ------ |
| Total cost         | $X.XX  |
| Invocations        | N      |
| Sessions           | N      |
| Avg per invocation | $X.XXX |

## By agent

| Agent             | Invocations | Tokens in | Tokens out | Cost  | Avg / call |
| ----------------- | ----------- | --------- | ---------- | ----- | ---------- |
| code-reviewer     | 42          | 380k      | 12k        | $1.82 | $0.043     |
| security-reviewer | 8           | 110k      | 3k         | $0.55 | $0.069     |
| explorer          | 215         | 420k      | 8k         | $0.21 | $0.001     |
| ...               | ...         | ...       | ...        | ...   | ...        |

## By skill

| Skill   | Invocations | Cost  | Notes                                           |
| ------- | ----------- | ----- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| /review | 42          | $1.82 | dispatches code-reviewer + integration-reviewer |
| /verify | 60          | $0.00 | procedural; no model calls                      |
| /debug  | 3           | $0.48 | ...                                             |

## By model

| Model  | Invocations | Cost  | Share |
| ------ | ----------- | ----- | ----- |
| opus   | 54          | $2.85 | 72%   |
| sonnet | 80          | $0.95 | 24%   |
| haiku  | 215         | $0.15 | 4%    |

## By day (last 14)

| Day        | Cost  | Invocations |
| ---------- | ----- | ----------- |
| 2026-04-21 | $0.38 | 12          |
| 2026-04-20 | $0.61 | 19          |
| ...        | ...   | ...         |

## Outliers

- code-reviewer avg $0.12/call (envelope $0.05-$0.30) — within range
- sonnet-based refactor-planner averaging $0.18 — above envelope; likely
  running against files over size limit. Recommendation: dispatch smaller
  scopes

## Budget cap status

- (Only present when `.claude/config/cost-caps.json` exists)
- <cap name>: $X of $Y (Z% used)
```

## Failure mode

If `.claude/telemetry/` has no entries (early phases before the telemetry hook exists), return "No telemetry yet" and exit. Do not guess or backfill from estimates.

## Privacy

- Never print the content of prompts or completions — only token counts
- Session IDs are aggregated; never tied to a specific user identifier (rule 00 §5)
- Telemetry files are gitignored (rule 00 via the telemetry README, when that directory is scaffolded in Sub-phase 9)

## Exit

Prints the report. Exits. Does not modify any files.
